question.text: Which chapters of SEBI Research Analyst Regulations, 2014 apply mutatis mutandis to proxy advisers?

answer.text: Chapters I, II, III, IV and V
Chapters II, III, and IV only
Chapters II, III, IV, V and VI

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The chapter clearly states that all provisions of Chapters II, III, IV, V and VI shall mutatis mutandis apply to proxy advisers. **The Trap:** One might assume all chapters apply or only some of them. **Cross-Exam Context:** NISM Series XV Research Analyst exam. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Remember the five chapters: Registration (II), Conflict Management & Disclosures (III), Inspection (IV), Procedure for Default (V), Miscellaneous (VI).
